title: Lightning Command!
description: A simple mod thats adds a lightning command
body:
Isn't it annoying that there isn't a lightning command? Well, this adds one!

The command is **/lightning** currently it only summons at your location.
The mod is for fabric 1.20.1 only!

Credits:
Mcreator

![in minecraft showing the command /lightning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27d9f4c1ce857a3f085085e8ba2abb18aa29b298.png)
